title: AWS Lambda handlers must not be async functions
description: Async functions are not supported in AWS Lambda handlers.
message: Lambda handler should not be an async function.
impact: Performance and compatibility issues may occur.
recommendation: Use a synchronous function as the Lambda handler.

noncompliant.description: An example of a noncompliant Lambda handler.

compliant.description: An example of a compliant Lambda handler.

why_is_this_an_issue: Async functions are not supported in AWS Lambda handlers due to limitations in the runtime environment.
how_to_fix: Replace the async function with a synchronous function as the Lambda handler.
